reviews.title: Very neat.
reviews.text:
1. Very clean despite its appearance
2. Delivery not available
3. Affordability
4. Friendliness

reviews.title: Good value for money, good location, looks a bit depressing but is clean!
reviews.positives: We booked this hotel last minute, so we did not have many options left. The hotel is very basic but well located; it's a short walk to the bus station and there are nice restaurants nearby. Getting to the market is also easy. Staff were friendly and the room was clean. There was a large tv.
reviews.negatives:
The room is very basic and the design is not that nice, which distracts from the fact that actually the room is spacious and clean. Not enough charging sockets near the bed. It had the type of bathroom where the shower is not sectioned off, meaning it gets wet beyond the shower. Didn't bother me too much but might bother others.
We were able to leave our luggage but it was completely visible in the lobby, not behind a closed door or locked. It felt like this must be safe to do but made me feel a bit uneasy about leaving valuables.

reviews.title: Great Value
reviews.text: Very good price for a nice, clean room. AC worked well. Bed was comfortable. Everything was clean. Amazing price/value. Decently sized room for Korea. The location wasn't as good as I was hoping and was a 10min walk from Jeju bus terminal. If you want a nice clean room, this is your hotel.

reviews.title: Convenient stay in the city center with good value for price
reviews.positives: The room was good and the beds comfortable. Location is central in Jeju city, so easy to get anywhere fast. Our stay was not expensive and the quality we got for the price was excellent.
reviews.negatives: I was woken up by other guests' early departure and late arrival in their room. This suggests sound insulation could be be better, but perhaps we were just unlucky with our neighbors.

reviews.title: Personally, I wouldn't recommend it.
reviews.text: The transportation is convenient; just a few steps outside is Dianong Road. There are many small restaurants nearby, giving it a lively atmosphere. It's very quiet, and the interior decoration is relatively new. However, there is one major problem: the smell is too strong, I'm not sure if it's formaldehyde or something else, but it's a heavy stench that I can't get rid of no matter how long I keep the windows open, it's making me a bit nauseous. Minor issues: 1. The shower drain is slow and collects water; 2. The view outside the window is completely blocked. Apart from these three points, everything else is fine.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
The lady at the reception was kind and helpful
Clean
Room size is good
reviews.negatives: Room was a bit dark. Lighting can be improved

reviews.title: Good places to view cherry blossoms.
reviews.text: I made a reservation to see the cherry blossom festival. I originally intended to go somewhere else, but there were no rooms available, so I booked this place as a second option, and it wasn't bad. The festival was within walking distance, and the interior was sufficient for sleeping. The parking space was a bit limited, but it was still possible to park every time. I didn't have high expectations, so I personally am satisfied.

reviews.title: Nice hotel, great location, value for price
reviews.positives: location.
reviews.negatives: no floor mate to dried my feet after showering.

reviews.title: I came before and this is my second time using it.
reviews.text: About a 10-minute walk from Jeju City Terminal, near Jeonnong Road. The facilities are clean. There is no separate shower booth. It feels like a motel.

reviews.title: Nice hotel, well located and comfortable
reviews.positives: The hotel was nice and clean. The beds were comfortable and the overall room was really good. We appreciated the thoughtful gestures of our housekeeper. Also, the hotel is really close to the airport.
reviews.negatives: While perfect if you are planning on staying in Jeju City, travelling around the island (by bus) might be more difficult since the bus terminal is 15-20 minutes walk away.

reviews.title: Clean and Big Room
reviews.text: A very big and clean room. Even though no one is at the reception area, you can ask and a staff member will come out from the door near the reception. I didn’t see any other guests. I only saw a housekeeper cleaning a guest room during our 4-night stay.

reviews.title: Great for discounted price
reviews.positives: The facilities in the hotel are new and clean. With discount, it’s definitely worth it.
reviews.negatives:
It’s pretty far from important bus stops and main attractions. Might be okay in any season but walking in the summer was hard.
The AC in the room has central switch and turns off automatically around 12 pm, when the cleaning comes. Again, can be uncomfortable just during the summer.

reviews.title: Value for money
reviews.text: Good location. Nice staff. Value for money

reviews.title: Manageable
reviews.positives: The location and the staff
reviews.negatives: The bathroom smelled funky. And it didnt go away.

reviews.title: That's nice.
reviews.text: I heard people are surprised by the appearance and impressed by the value for money. The exterior really looks like an old hotel, but perhaps due to remodeling, the interior was clean and nice. It suddenly got cold yesterday, but I was very satisfied to find an electric blanket on the bed. Haha, I'll come again next time.

reviews.title: Great hotel if you want a place to sleep. Hotel staff aren’t always available even during business hours.
reviews.positives: Easy to find, and close to the bus terminal to easily explore the island.
reviews.negatives: My room has a terrible view of the building behind me. But there’s little they can do about that.

reviews.title: 가성비호텔!
reviews.text: 건물외관이 낡아보여서 살짝 걱정했었는데 객실은 꽤 깨끗했고 침대도 편안했습니다. 공항근처라서 편했고요. 프론트 데스크 직원분도 친절해서 잘 지내다 갔습니다.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The staff was super helpful , and they went out their way to help us (even to book a taxi). Close to all amenities, and  have good connection to buses in the area.

reviews.title: Don't be Fooled By The Exterior
reviews.text:
This location is a 10 minute walk from the Jeju Bus Terminal.

The exterior of the building seems to be done quite some time ago.

Once you stepped into the room, it looks like just renovated before.  Almost brand new.  Quite cosy.

The reception knows how to converse in English.  No issues with communication.  And the female staff was friendly enough to help find the nearest location to buy a power adapter.

Not sure if the air-con was faulty.  Cos it produces hot air.  The weather was cold back then.  So did not call reception.

Other than the air-con, all's good.

reviews.title: EXCELLENT 🌟
reviews.positives: Very spacious ( you should correct as written 4sqm in booking page:) , very clean, close to bus station ,  amazing to sleep in heating bed, very helpful staff. We  enjoyed so much during our 4 days stay, we will absolutely choose again here in our next trip
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: It's a place I want to visit again.
reviews.text: I came alone this time, but this is a place I want to come with a friend or a partner. I will come again!! Thank you.

reviews.title: Great place only a short walk from the bus terminal, short bus from the airport.
reviews.positives: A very nice place to stay that is an easy walk from the Jeju bus terminal. The woman who checked us in was super friendly and helpful. The room/bed was comfortable and clean, a good shower, and there was a GIANT television. Several convenience store located close by. The airport is just a ten minute bus ride after a five minute walk (it took us 22 minutes from door to terminal). The traditional market is an easy 30 minute walk. We would definitely stay here again.

reviews.title: Good location and clean hotel.
reviews.text: The hotel's facilities are overall clean. It is very suitable for family travel.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The room was very clean, spacious and had all the necessities. The bed was very comfortable and the staff was so helpful and friendly. Free parking is available in front of the building. If you’re travelling by bus, the express bus terminal is a 10-min-walk away! There‘s a cvs and supermarket near by and you can get to Dongmun market within 10 min by bus (bus stop 2 min from the place) or 20 min by walking.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Family visit for 4 people
reviews.text: It's cleaner than I thought, and the interior remodeling is new and tidy compared to the exterior. I highly recommend staying here for a day after coming out of the airport. There is a convenience store right next door, and Dongmun Market is a short distance away.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Best
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: It's average.
reviews.text: I was taken aback when I first entered because there were no people, but after reading the instructions, I was attended to. I think it's nice to be able to come and go without needing to worry about being seen when leaving and entering the accommodation. It was clean, and even though I made a last-minute reservation, I had a good experience.

reviews.title: Great stay with very helpful staff
reviews.positives: Great location. Excellent service. Front desk/reception was very helpful. They helped us with sightseeing and even made us fresh coffee.
reviews.negatives: There is nobody at front desk at night. However, there is a phone number we can call.

reviews.title: Very Clean and Receptionist Polite
reviews.text:
Nice staying in this hotel as it is clean and the receptionist very helpful. On my last day, she arrange a cab to bring me to the airport.

Surrounding there are a few cafes which I can have good breakfast before my trip to the attractions.  It is a very quiet place and the most impressive part is the TV.  It is so huge that you are like watching cinema on your bed.  Recommended to stay here as it is very near to the airport, so taxi fare is very cheap.

reviews.title: Would like to stay again
reviews.positives:
The bed and pillow are comfortable and 
 window is openable. We prefer a nature breeze to air conditioning.
reviews.negatives: Ventilation in showroom/toilet is a bit weak.

reviews.title: Quiet and convenient transportation.
reviews.text: I had some errands to run in Jeju City and stayed alone; it was clean, quiet, and convenient for buses and taxis, so I will visit again next time. It is 10 minutes from the airport, and there are many good restaurants within 10 minutes' reach.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: We got a free upgrade and the people at the reception were very very helpful :)
reviews.negatives: The bathroom is small tho

reviews.title: Feel like 4 star hotel
reviews.text: Clean and new!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Amazing locstion.

reviews.title: Nice staff / convenient location
reviews.text: Wanted a nice  quiet place near the airport and when arrived at hotel was greeted by friendly and helpful staff.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Great location, central but away from the noise.

reviews.title: Perfect location for cherry blossoms
reviews.text: It’s one block away from the cherry blossom road in Jeju City. Room is quite big also for 2 pax. My only issue is the absence of a divider or shower curtain in the bathroom. Overall good place

reviews.title: There’s nowhere around here that’s as good as this, seriously.
reviews.text: It was about 60,000 won per night, and it seems that it hasn't been long since the renovation because the room condition was good. There was a smell like laundry that hadn't dried in the first room they assigned me, and when I asked to change it, they kindly offered me a different room, so I had a very pleasant stay thanks to that. The location is also close to places like Jeonnong-ro and City Hall, and I really liked it.

reviews.title: Muy buen alojamiento si buscas algo tranquilo y muy local
reviews.positives: La habitación era muy grande y la cama muy cómoda. Se nota que lo han reformado. El barrio es muy tranquilo, es una zona residencial. Y muy cerca de la estación de autobuses de Jeju.

reviews.title: Good for the money
reviews.text: It’s an old hotel, but everything was clean and the staff were friendly. Also close to bus stops and the intercity bus terminal.

reviews.title: Perfecto para mochileros un lugar bueno, bonito y barato
reviews.positives:
El lugar es muy comodo, silencioso, seguro, perfecto para viajeros cerca tiene una tienda 24 horas y a lado un restaurante de pollo muy bueno ... es economico y ofrece mucho, limpian diario el cuarto y dejan agua...

si regreso a JEJU volveria a hospedarme aqui
reviews.negatives: es perfecto el lugar para mochileros.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: excellent location, clean room and alley way

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: La instalaciones está como se muestran en la imagen, todo limpio, muy cómodo, tienes agua y café libre. La atención muy cordial

reviews.title: The best choice
reviews.text: I made a reservation on the same day and used the place, and it was extremely clean for such an affordable price. Thanks to the blackout curtains, I had a really good sleep and rested well. There are also nice and delicious bars nearby, and I was really satisfied. If I stay in Jeju City again, it will definitely be here.

reviews.title: Calidad precio vale la pena
reviews.positives: tenía parking y agua gratis a disposición, también microondas, ascensor y una tv grande.
reviews.negatives: Las toallas eran pequeñas y el extractor del baño hacía mucho ruido

reviews.title: Okay.
reviews.text: Overall, it was clean and nice. There was a convenience store right next door, which was great for buying necessary items. I was on the 6th floor, and the hot water was good, and the water pressure was great. The soundproofing was a bit lacking, but I was generally satisfied, so I definitely would consider visiting again.

reviews.title: Muy buenas instalaciones
reviews.positives: Muy limpio, todo perfecto, el personal muy amable y las instalaciones muy buenas. De 12:00-15:00 no se podía usar el aire acondicionado, no sé si eso es siempre o justo en nuestra estancia.

reviews.title: The best vacation spot.
reviews.text: The location is good, the rooms are clean, and the owner is friendly.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Tiene una ubicación muy centrica, se encuentra cerca de las atracciones en la ciudad de Jeju
reviews.negatives: El lobby es un poco viejo, sin embargo las habitaciones con grandes y cómodas

reviews.title: Clean, comfortable stay
reviews.text: This is a motel, not truly a hotel, but the room was so clean and big that it truly surprised me. If you're coming in for the annual cherry blossom festival, there could not be a better location as it's location just minutes away from the heart of everything, and yet secluded enough that the noise never reaches you.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The bed was comfy and the room clean
reviews.negatives: The hotel was not cosy, the toilet was stuck, the shower broken and we only got very small towel. The staff was not so nice. The room except the bathroom was okay with a comfy bed and a fridge but the general atmosphere of this hotel was really cold. Restaurant was closed and in the lobby there was no heating so you had to wear your jacket everywhere outside of the room. I would not recommend it at all (at least in winter)

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Great location - barely 5mins walk to Jeonnong-ro cherry blossom street! Though room was cosy and quite small, it was pleasantly well-appointed with lots of practical and useful touches eg strong water shower, heated blankets, complete with toothbrush/toothpaste and shaver, lots of plug points with universal power adapter and usb ports, and free street front parking.

reviews.title: Décevant
reviews.positives: Pas loin de l aéroport.
reviews.negatives: Réception sombre voire lugubre personne à la réception. Un mot avec un numéro de tel. J écris via la messagerie booking en anglais on me répond en coréen.

reviews.title: Visita a Jeju
reviews.text:
Escogí este hotel por las reseñas.
La habitación correcta y limpia. Entorno tranquilo y silencioso. 
El día de llegada el personal de recepción fue amable, pero luego era difícil encontrala, la barrera idiomática era evidente pues no hablaba mucho inglés y no supo darme explicaciones de lugares donde salir o ir cuando pregunté, una lastima. De todos modos la estancia fue cómoda para mis necesidades que era dormir y darme una ducha.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives:
La chambre est spacieuse , propre, fonctionnelle, la literie est très confortable.

L' établissement propose effectivement un parking privé mais il est éloigné du front de mer et autres points d''intérêt de la ville. Pour autant, il est bien de servi en bus.

L' établissement et situé idéalement pour ceux ayant un véhicule pour sillonner l'île
reviews.negatives:
Le personnel s'exprime mal ou pas du tout en anglais.

Le service de chambres n'est pas systématiquement proposé.

reviews.title: très bien placé
reviews.text: Hotel propre et très bien placé, personnel accueillant et parlant bien anglais.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Chambre avec vue sur la mer
Emplacement proche des bus et du terminal routier
Accès facile depuis l'aéroport 
Propreté
reviews.negatives:
Chambre assez petite avec peu de place pour poser les sacs à dos 
Peu ou pas de personnel à l'accueil

reviews.title: Preiswertes Hotel fußläufig zum Bus Terminal
reviews.text: Günstiges, sauberes Hotel 800m vom Busbahnhof entfernt. Gute Lage für Wanderer!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Chambre spacieuse et confortable. Dommage qu'on ne puisse pas se faire un thé/café dans la chambre. Et très surpris d'apprendre que le petit-déjeuner ne serait servi que le dimanche... Donc sur notre séjour de 4 jours nous avons dû nous organiser autrement, pas simple de trouver un endroit ouvert tôt en matinée...
Personnel d'accueil plutôt absent et peu avenant.

reviews.title: 이호텔 절대 이용하지마세요 가격싼거 이외는 아주 불량한 호텔입니다.
reviews.text: 직원들 불친절하고 음식 형편없고 침실에서 빈데가 살고있습니다.

reviews.title: Hôtel est bien placé, dans quartier résidentiel et proche de la gare des autobus
reviews.positives: La décoration des chambres est bien , les matelas confortables.
reviews.negatives: La chambre n’avait pas été faite, nos  poubelles étaient pleines! Pas de drap de bain seulement des petites serviettes de toilettes.

reviews.title: 공항 근처 숙박
reviews.text: 나쁘지 않았습니다

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Chambre agréable conforme aux photos.

reviews.title: 잠을 잘 수가 없음...
reviews.text: 화장실 물소리에 잠을 잘 수가 없음

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: La taille de la chambre est correct, pas trop loin des bus
reviews.negatives: Dommage qu'il n'y ait pas de petit déjeuner

reviews.title: 가성비 좋은 동문시장 가까운 호텔입니다.
reviews.text:
가성비좋은 동문시장 도보로 가능한 호텔입니다.
조금 연식은 있어 올드한 분위기 지만 나쁘지는 않았어요.

reviews.title: Très bonne situation géographique, parfait pour un week-end sur l'île de Jeju.
reviews.positives: Chambre charmante, en parfaite correspondance avec nos attentes. Très bonne situation géographique, proche des transports et de l'aéroport. Lit très confortable. Les employés parlent anglais et sont très serviables.
reviews.negatives: chambre un peu sombre...

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
La chambres était spacieuse, les lits sont confortables. Et il y a tout les équipements nécessaires.
En plus il y a plein Restaurants au alentour et ce n'est pas loin de l'aéroport (à peu près 20 min en bus)

reviews.title: 괜찮았습니다:)
reviews.text: 가격대비굳

reviews.title: Super nuit passée !
reviews.positives: Personnel très agréable, calme, propreté
reviews.negatives: La devanture de l'hôtel n'est pas jolie mais l'intérieur est très bien soigné

reviews.title: 제주 공항이랑 가깝고 깔끔해요
reviews.text: 버스투어때문에 제주공항및 제주체육관이랑 가까운 호텔을 선택했는데 만족스럽습니다 가격도 정말 저렴하고 숙소도 깔끔해서 또 제주도를 방문한다면 이용하고 싶습니다 살짝 아쉬운점은 샤워 부스 형식으로 화장실이 되어있었으면 더 좋았을꺼 같습니다

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Die Lage war sehr gut.
reviews.negatives: Kein Aufzug und ein unangenehmer Geruch

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: 전체적으로 무난함

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Größe des Zimmers, Ausstattung
reviews.negatives: Mäßige englischkenntnisse des Personals

reviews.title: 괜찮았습니다
reviews.text: 출장으로 하루 있었는데, 나름 쾌적하고 괜찮았습니다!

reviews.title: Super Preis- Leistungsverhältnis
reviews.positives: Die nahe Lage zum Intercity Bus Tetminal war  sehr gut, es gab Restaurants und Cafés in  der Nähe
reviews.negatives: Für den Preis gibt es nichts zu kritisieren, alles super

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
가격대비 만족합니다
공항근처로 하루밤 자기에 좋아요

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Camera ordinata, discretamente spaziosa (ne avevamo una da tre in 2) acqua calda e buona pressione dell acqua.
reviews.negatives: Sarebbe stata utile una presa vicino al letto.

reviews.title: 1인 숙박
reviews.text: 가성비 숙소입니다

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: La posizione, a 5 minuti dal bus terminal.

reviews.title: 보기와다른곳
reviews.text: 가격대비  좋아요

reviews.title: Struttura sicuramente da riprovare
reviews.positives:
Camera spaziosa davvero enorme.
Hotel estremamente pulito.
Personale disponibile e facile comunicare in lingua inglese.
reviews.negatives: Purtroppo non c’era la possibilità di fare colazione forse dovuto al fatto che fossimo in bassa stagione.

reviews.title: 가성비 최고입니다
reviews.text: 좋아집니다 또한 위치가  좋아집니다

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: L'hotel era pulito e il personale disponibile

reviews.title: 잘 쉬었어요
reviews.text: 하룻밤 편히 쉬다 갑니다

reviews.title: Zeer vriendelijk personeel en super hygiënisch! Aanrader en goede prijs kwaliteitsverhouding!
reviews.positives:
Zeer vriendelijke eigenaresse van het hotel! Behulpzaam en neemt uitgebreid de tijd om je te helpen. Het hotel ligt gelegen aan een straat met winkels en overige faciliteiten. Het is wel beter te bereiken met auto maar denk dat je in Jeju sowieso een auto nodig hebt om iets te bereiken. 

Het hotel is hygiënisch maar niet echt gezellig. Wel recent gerenoveerd maar door de vele grijs tinten voelt het wel somber aan.
reviews.negatives: De vele grijstinten en sombere kamers. Gevangenis gevoel.

reviews.title: 전농로 벗꽃 축제~~
reviews.text: 축제참여 하기 좋음

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
離機場蠻近的，車程十分鐘左右～
建議自駕，因為周邊比較安靜，若要到鬧區吃飯買東西還是要開車方便些～
房內燈光比較暗，且好像沒有冷氣，我們怎麼開都是暖氣🥹（也有可能是我們不會操作）

reviews.title: 제주 개인여행 최적
reviews.text:
공항과 버스터미널이 가까워 좋음
아침 조식이 저렴하고 맛있음

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
交通便捷
員工優秀
reviews.negatives: 如果有洗衣機更好

reviews.title: 가격대비 좋습니다
reviews.text:
모텔과 같은 외부에 한번 흠칫하지만,
안에는 가격대비 깔끔하고 좋습니다.
모텔과 호텔 그 사이의 느낌입니다.
전 나름 만족했습니다.

reviews.title: 短暫住宿沒什麼問題，房間小但是乾淨
reviews.positives: 房間比較小，燈光稍暗，小冰箱不冷，浴室沒有乾濕分離，不過很快就乾燥了很厲害！冷氣的遙控器是和電視遙控器結合在一起，需要說明才會發現。每個房間都有WIFI速度很快。
reviews.negatives: 感覺是家庭經營，櫃台小姐會躺在後面房間休息睡覺，沒有一直在前台。最後一天離開時因為我們四個人有四個行李箱，麻煩櫃檯先生幫忙叫大台計程車去機場，結果櫃檯先生自己開車載我們去，還不跟我們收錢，真是很感恩！可能是家庭經營的好處吧！

reviews.title: 좋아요
reviews.text: 깨끗해요

reviews.title: 離機場近、費用划算、隔天要離開濟州的好選擇、但離兩個鬧區都不近
reviews.positives: 服務人員親切
reviews.negatives: 房間燈光昏暗、浴室蓮蓬頭出水量不夠大、冷氣很大聲影響睡覺

reviews.title: 위치는 좋음
reviews.text:
직원분 친절하시고 위치좋음
바닥난방안돼서인지 침대에 전기장판 있음 발시려움 슬리퍼필수 천정에 냉온풍기 있지만 꽤시끄러움
냉온풍기말고도 무슨소리진지 기계소리 소음이 지속적으로계속들림

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: 房間還不錯，離機場也不遠，可惜離公車站牌還要走5、600公尺。

reviews.title: 직원분들 모두 친절하세요
reviews.text:
기념일로 여행 갔던건데 가게에서 주문한 커스텀 케이크가 룸 냉장고에 안들어가 로비에 보관 가능한 곳 문의하니 친절하게 응대해주셨습니다^^
그 외에도 직원분들 모두 친절하셨고 룸도 저는 개인적으로 아주 맘에 들었어요!!

reviews.title: 개인여행자
reviews.text: 깔끔하고 편하게 지내다 갑니다!

reviews.title: 가성비 좋아요
reviews.text:
남자친구랑 기념일로 간 곳 인데 방 안에 있는 냉장고가 작아서 케이크가 안들어가 프론트에 문의 했더니 맡아주셨어요.
마지막 날 늦게 체크아웃했더니 11시쯤 에어컨 점검이 들어가 꺼지더라구요! 미리 안내는 해주십니다.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.negatives:
1.  한국호텔이 다 그런지???
   부킹닷컴에는  무료세면도구라 써 있으나 화장실에 1회용 치솔,치약. 면도기  없어 불편했으며
2. 에약시 전용 욕실에 욕조 혹은 샤워기로  되어 있으나  가능하면 욕조가 있었으면????

reviews.title: 싸다고 해서 별루였다 생각했는데 깨끗하고 좋아요 가성비 좋아

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: 가격대비 괜찮은 숙소입니다.  전 공항과 가까운 숙소를 찾다 보니 이곳을 예약했는데 잠만 자고 나온다는 개념으로 예약했는데 방은 깨긋하고 조용했습니다.
reviews.negatives: 방이 좁은 듯한 느낌과 창문을 개폐하기 어려운 점 바로 앞 건물이 있어서 창문을 열기가 어려워요.

reviews.title: 아늑 조용 만족
reviews.text: 좋습니다.

reviews.title: 깔끔그자체
reviews.text:
깔끔합니다 주차도편하고 주면애먹을곳도많고 우선가격도 참착합니다 카페라운지 커피향도좋았으며 무었보다 방이 제일깔끔하였습니다.
다만 뷰가 다른숙소보이는뷰이긴한데 뷰보러가나여 시내에서이만한데없습니다.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: 청결
reviews.negatives: 화장실 등 시설 확인

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Хороший отель, чистый номер, белые простыни. На стойки регистрации очень дружелюбный персонал, говорит по английски. Из душевых принадлежностей шампунь, кондиционер, гель для душа, мыло, фен. Зубной пасты и щетки нет (может быть просто мне забыли выдать).
В номере холодильник (2 бутылочки воды по 0,5л., телевизор, чайник, кондиционер. 
Ремонт номера хороший, но потолок без ремонта, может у них такой своеобразный прикол, потолок в стиле лофт😅

reviews.title:
전반적으러  만족해요
직원분도 친절하시고
reviews.positives: 깨끗한  칭구   룸 컨디션 좋았읍니다
reviews.negatives:
칭대가 오래 된건가요
삐걱거리는 소리 신경쓰이더라구요

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: 샤워기 수압이 좀 약했어요

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: 침구가 깨끗. 공항까지의 거리
reviews.negatives: 방음

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
가격과 위치가 좋았어요. 주차도 편했구요.
방은 조금 좁은듯도 싶지만, 잠만 자실거라면 더 없이 좋은 선택일 것 같아요. 구조는 모텔을 호텔로 개조한 것 같은데, 실내ㅡ및.객실 인테리어에 호텔 느낌을 잘 구현했어요. 짜치지 않아요. 추천할 만합니다. 효퇴국수 도보 3분컷, 우진해장국과 같은 도로라서 차로 5분컷, 공항 10분컷, 제주 오후 도착하는 첫날이시거나 아침에 나가시는 분들 숙소로 정말 좋을거에요.
reviews.negatives: 로비가 썰렁하고 어두워요. 카운터에 직원은 불러야 안에서 나오십니다. 근데 그게 뭐가 중요한가요? 어차피 객실만 이용할건데. 여행 많이 다니는데, 이정도의 숙소면 가격 시설 모두 좋은 편이에요. 추천드립니다.

reviews.title: 가성비 좋은 호텔
reviews.positives: 객실이 아주 깨끗했어요.

reviews.title: Very good

reviews.negatives: 객실 청소 요청해야 함...ㅠㅠ

reviews.negatives: 조명이 조금 어둡다.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: 깨끗하고 티비도 엄청 크고 넷플릭스도 되서 좋았습니다
reviews.negatives: 난방이 잘 안되서 좀 추웟어요

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: 깨끗해서 너무 촣았어요

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: 좋음.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: 저렴한 가격에 깨끗, 필요한 건 다 갖춤

reviews.title: 꽤괜찮은 여행
reviews.positives: 침구가 아주 깨끗하고 정리가 잘된깔끔한 느낌, 방이 작지않고 엄마랑 둘이서 간건데 넓직한느낌이르 세명이와도 되겠다 싶었습니다, 랜터카햐서 돌아다녔는데 차로 공항 12분 정도 거리라 아주 좋았고 주변이 관광지역이 아니라서 조용한점도 맘에 들었음. 근처에 아침식사가능한 곳 많았음. 글고 침구가 포근해서 하루 마무리하기 딱좋은! 방공기는 적절한 온도로 잘 조절이되고 침대는 전기매트(?) 그거 있어서 따뜻~, 화장실도 적당한 사이즈에 온수도 바로바로 나와서 좋았습니다
reviews.negatives: 걍 전체적으로 만족

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
청결 상태 좋다는 평이 많아 선택한 숙소인데 정말 깔끔해서 마음에 들었습니다! 주차장도 4칸 정도 있고 공항이나 시장도 가까워서 좋았어요 ㅎㅎ
하루 편하게 묵었습니다!
reviews.negatives: 옆방에서 큰소리나면 조금 다 들려서 방음이 조금 약했던 점이 약간의 단점이었습니다..근데 저는 무던해서 그냥 잘 잤어요 ㅋㅋㅋ

reviews.title: 整體來說一般
reviews.positives: 地點尚算方便，在市區有泊車位的酒店
reviews.negatives: 酒店頗舊，環境很暗，房間細，設施少，WiFi 差，有熱水壺但沒有水杯

reviews.title: 整体还不错
reviews.positives: 距离机场打车十几分钟，还是比较方便的，不在大路上，比较安静，房间也挺干净的
reviews.negatives: 房间略小，没有正经的桌子

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: 酒店非常宽敞，有饮用水和烧水壶以及一次性用品。电视非常大。
reviews.negatives: 房间地漏下水有些慢。

reviews.title: Nice time！
reviews.positives: 地理位置很不错，距离典农路很近，出门就可以看到樱花，楼下就有便利店买东西也方便。房间设施齐全，非常卫生，对于卫生高要求的我认真查看了浴室的死角，都打扫的很干净，总体性价比超高！p.s.前台姐姐人真的很温柔也很热心，耐心帮助我们联系kakao T司机以及客服，帮我们找回了多付的一笔车费。 希望大家在犹豫住宿的时候看到这条评论可以多多考虑这家酒店哦🌸真的很不错～
reviews.negatives: 无

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: 立地刚刚好，房间整洁，景色也好。
reviews.negatives: 空调噪音稍微有些大

reviews.title: 下次还会入住
reviews.negatives: 含早餐就好了

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: لا بأس
reviews.negatives: لا يوجد

reviews.title: Делать уборку я предлагаю!
reviews.positives: Расположение удачное. Номер достаточно свежий, в хорошем состоянии,
reviews.negatives: За 4 ночи ни разу не убрались) Хотя сами предложили делать уборку каждый день, хах!

reviews.title: Не лучший вариант
reviews.positives:
Выбрали отель из-за расположения - он недалеко от аллеи цветения вишни. На одну две ночи максимум, у нас было три и мы подустали от отеля.
Огромный, нет, даже ОГРОМНЫЙ телевизор - с нетфликсом и т.п
Рядом автобусный вокзал
До аэропорта на общественном транспорте 15-20 минут.
reviews.negatives:
Нет одноразовых тапочек, резиновые многоразовые, которые до тебя обували другие гости - лично у меня вызывают дискомфорт
Кровать скрипит и как-то ходит ходуном, не могу это объяснить, но когда твой сосед переворачивается с боку на бок - тебя трясет как на волнах
В душе нет перегородки и водой заливается вся ванная комната - знаю, что такое в целом норма для Кореи, но мне было неудобно
В номере куча звуков - все скрипит шумит пыхтит, спать было тяжело
Сложилось ощущение, что соотношение цена качество - не совсем корректное

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Находиться от аэропорта не так далеко, рядом есть комбини магазины
reviews.negatives: Кондиционер был очень шумный, от пляжа далеко

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Номер был визуально приятным и чистым
reviews.negatives: Тяжело было разобраться с пультом от кондиционера, который выглядел как пульт от телевизора

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Отель чистый, по виду недавно был ремонт. Большая кровать, чистое постельное белье, огромный телевизор, минибар, чайник. В номере есть стол и стулья (мы останавливались в 4 отелях и только в этом они были, что оказалось очень удобно), гель для душа, шампунь и кондиционер (тоже был только в этом отеле), зубные щетки, паста, бритва и расческа, фен, тапочки, кондиционер. На первом этаже есть столовая с бесплатным чаем и кофе, микроволновкой.
reviews.negatives: В номере не было кружек

reviews.title: Na noc przed wylotem OK.
reviews.positives: Dobra lokalizacja z niezwykłym klubem tenisowym w okolicy. Młodzież trenowałą tesnia "na sucho" bez piłęk w grupie, na korcie podzielonym na części.
reviews.negatives: Trochę bezpłciowy wygląd

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: At first glance during the day the rooms look modern and nice.
reviews.negatives: There's a lot of equipment in the room for internet and for example, turning on lights. All of this equipment illuminates the entire room which disturbed my sleep. The bathroom is a bit strange as you are almost showering in the toilet. At times the hotel did not seem to be staffed although the hotel was accessible by anyone, that's a safety problem.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Location and big room
reviews.negatives: The room was really hot and humid, and the hotel cut the air conditioning in the middle of the night

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.negatives: La atención. Inflexibles para checkin y checkout,  imposible desayunar ni obtener recomendaciones...

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: There’s a big supermarket within working distance. WiFi is good.
reviews.negatives: The air condition not working. Hot in room🤣. Bed is hard for me.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Good location
Comfortable room

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Comfortable room and proper cleaned.
reviews.negatives: No breakfast included

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: the room was comfy and bed aswell! but staff very nice
reviews.negatives: a bit far from the center to walk.

reviews.title: Good budget stay in Jeju
reviews.positives: The Renaissance Hotel is a good budget hotel in an area where there are restaurants on the main road and a 24 hour convenience store on the corner.  Although the room is small, it is clean and adequate. The toilet is standard (not bidet) and it is a toilet/shower combined bathroom typical in Korea - i.e. the shower is not separate. The restaurant in the hotel is not open. Not sure if that is permanent. Big TV screen for a small room! And the small fridge surprisingly fits a few things in it. Staff are welcoming and helpful, but not visible 24/7.
reviews.negatives: The air conditioning went off from 12noon to 3pm. Not sure if this was because we were booked originally for 1 night only, and then re-booked the room for a 2nd night. However, we were given a fan, but wasn't strong enough for the hot weather.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Location is great, convenience store and restaurants are very close. Price is reasonable. Close to airport. Free parking.
reviews.negatives: No view.

reviews.title: Good experience and will come back. Thanks
reviews.positives: The bed is heated spa bed
reviews.negatives: Too far from city centre

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Very good location, about 10 minutes walk to the bus terminal. There is a budget local fast food restaurant close to the bus terminal, Yong. The food quality is very good and we ate there many times. There is also a supermarket nearby. We had a very enjoyable stay there.

reviews.title: Comfortable stay, but the AC is not on 12-15
reviews.positives: We were upgraded to a bigger room, so we had plenty of space. There was a double bed and two single beds. Middle of the room was a table and two chairs. From the TV you can sign up your Netflix account and watch it. The room was nice, the beddings were great and comfortable. Downstairs you can get free coffee and there is a microwave as well. There is a bus stop close by, but the bus stop to the airport is about 10-15 min walk. There are also few CU and GS25 nearby.
reviews.negatives: Early check in wasn’t possible so you have to wait until the check in time. They stop the AC around 12 to 15 so in that time you really cannot stay in the room because it’s too hot in there. Otherwise the hotel was comfortable.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: I made a last-minute reservation at this hotel due to a temporary cancellation of my flight, and the hotel staff provided a lot of necessary help. Thanks to the hotel staff for their considerate service.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Clean room  with heated bed .  .esp when temp was - 10'c

reviews.title: Definitely will head back to stay there again for my next trip.
reviews.positives: Was upgraded to a family room.  Room was big enough for 4 or more pax.  Huge shower area too.
reviews.negatives: The only thing I dont like is the car park but owner was kind to allow us to park just outside the hotel which is very convenient and thoughtful of her.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Big rooms, nice common room with free coffee/tea, microwave
reviews.negatives: sheets were dirty

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Very good location and nice place, clean and very modern rooms.

reviews.title: Great, would go again
reviews.positives: Good price and location, clean everything
reviews.negatives: No parking spots left even though I requested it in my booking, couldn't go into the lounge after midnight (may have been miscommunication with front desk on my end, I thought it was 24/7)

reviews.title: Great place to stay with amazing staff, but be aware that it takes some time to go to the city center
reviews.positives: Great and friendly staff. Amazing room, great parking and everything was taken care of perfectly
reviews.negatives: The location was quite far away from the city center (30m walking or uber)

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Great place - clean, spacious, nice TV. All one needs for a night in Jeju town :)
reviews.negatives: N/A

reviews.title: A short but comfortable stay
reviews.positives: Great room with lots of space to move around or put our luggage. We had 2 beds (double and single), a table with chair where we could eat something from the seven eleven's if we wanted (which is located just around the corner), other two small desks (one with a mirror) and a TV. The bathroom is the typical korean one, with an open shower and was provided with all the necessary things (shampoo, conditioner, soap, hairdryer, towels). Everything was quite clean and the staff was helpful and kind.
reviews.negatives: Anything particular.

reviews.title: Comfy Room
reviews.positives:
-comfy Room with enough space to open luggage 
-receptionist was available which was good since there was no communication prior to check-in and we arrived very late
reviews.negatives: -we had mosquitoes in the room since the windows do not close entirely

reviews.title: The staff is always moving. It is alike hide from customers.
reviews.positives: Clean location friendly staff
reviews.negatives: Cold hard to use heater

reviews.title: Nice stay with walking distance to Cherry blossom view point
reviews.positives: The hotel located near to street that full of cherry blossom trees and close to supermarket. The room are clean and they will clean it everyday. Room is spacious and have fridge to keep food and drinks.
reviews.negatives: The aircon not really work, most of the time will become heater, may be due to we stay at cold season. The road to hotel abit narrow and nit easy to drive in with car.

reviews.title: Well priced hotel centrally located.
reviews.positives: Well priced in a good location near the bus station. There was tea and coffee available. Very large television. Property had a lift.
reviews.negatives: Nothing to say.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Practical, comfortable with everything we needed

reviews.title: Pleasant stay and great facilities
reviews.positives: The quietness and comfort
reviews.negatives: Small towels

reviews.title: Close to the airport, very clean.
reviews.positives: Clean, neat, late check in available.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Nice stay
reviews.positives: I had a very comfortable stay. It is a spacious and clean room and staff are also very attentive

reviews.title: Comfortable room, nice stay
reviews.positives: Comfortable beds and nice room
reviews.negatives: The automatic light kept turning on when the curtain blows if you have the window open

reviews.title: Spacious, quiet, clean and professional
reviews.positives: It was so quiet, clean, professionally run and in a great location. Any queries were acknowledged by reception. The resources in the room were fabulous.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Very nice hotel for a good price. Clean and nice rooms. Very helpful staff. There was a possibility to store our luggage after check out.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Everything was OK, but only small towels (it wasn't problem for us)...

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The lady at the reception she is very nice and helpful

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
- Very clean.
- We could park in front of the entrance door, which was great.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: I don't understand why this hotel is not more popular. Excellent location close to bus station with several restaurants and supermarkets nearby, rooms are newly renovated, receptionist speaks English. Despite being so central my room was so quiet that I could sleep with open windows. Very fast Wifi!
